content: Just as an operating system uses hierarchical virtual context management to extend working memory for running processes, autonomous biological/chemical agents can leverage a MemGPT-inspired memory tiering system to dynamically swap in and out environmental context needed to exert long-term, goal-directed effects in complex, changing environments. This re-frames general agent action not as static response to immediate stimuli, but as active hierarchical management of context to sustain long-term causal influence.
